name: pce-mcp
description: Captures your Claude conversations and MCP tool calls into a local SQLite database for personal review.
long_description: PCE (Personal Cognitive Engine) is a local-first capture layer for AI conversations. This Desktop Extension exposes six MCP tools (pce_capture, pce_query, pce_stats, pce_sessions, pce_session_messages, pce_capture_pair) that let Claude record its own interactions, query previously captured data, and summarise your AI usage — all stored on your machine in a SQLite database with full-text search. Data never leaves your computer; no telemetry; no cloud sync. Requires the pce_core daemon (Python, Apache-2.0) running locally on 127.0.0.1:9800 (configurable via the pce_core_url user setting).

tools.name: pce_capture
tools.description: Record an AI interaction into the local PCE database. Use this to capture your own conversations or API calls.

tools.name: pce_query
tools.description: Query recent AI interaction captures from the local PCE database (filter by provider / host / direction).

tools.name: pce_stats
tools.description: Get summary statistics from the local PCE database: total captures, by provider, by direction, by source.

tools.name: pce_sessions
tools.description: List normalized conversation sessions from the local PCE database.

tools.name: pce_session_messages
tools.description: Get all messages from a specific PCE conversation session.

tools.name: pce_capture_pair
tools.description: Get the full request/response pair for a given pair_id from the PCE database.

pce_core_url.title: PCE Core daemon URL
pce_core_url.description: URL of the local pce_core HTTP API. Default works out-of-the-box with a standard PCE install.
